'''Clee Rhara''' was a red-headed [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Clee Rhara, you know. Charismatic, she is. A following among the young pilots, she has.|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] to [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]|<ref name="JASE" />}}
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Clee Rhara was a contemporary of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Tahl]], receiving [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. After years of training as a [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Guardian]] and specializing as an [[Jedi ace|ace]] in the [[Jedi Starfighter Corps]], Clee Rhara attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="JASE" />

Selecting the young [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Garen Muln]] as her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Rhara worked with the Starfighter Corps to establish a piloting academy on [[Centax-2/Legends|Centax-2]], one of Coruscant's [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. While Rhara worked to see the academy open, many members of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] opposed funding for the Starfighter Corps' academy. Rumors were propagated in the Senate that Rhara had sabotaged the project herself in order to prompt further funding. The Order saw the funding bill come to a vote where it was undermined through the secret machinations of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]. The facility became too expensive to maintain and was eventually shut down.<ref name="JASE" />

Despite the project's failure, Rhara and Muln were kept busy with assignments from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Training Muln to [[Jedi Knight/Legends|knighthood]], the pair continued to work with each other on missions. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], Rhara and Muln accompanied Master [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] and her Padawan [[Ferus Olin]] to the [[Xanlanner system/Legends|Xanlanner system]] on an assignment. En route, the Jedi received a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] from Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[TY44]]. They picked up Kenobi and his Padawan [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on [[Vanqor/Legends|Vanqor]], where they had crash-landed. The team then traveled to [[Typha-Dor]] to help them thwart the Vanqor invasion.<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Moment of Truth" />
